consumer_purpose: Deliver the remaining 3 Phase 1 desktop app features from the audit: Agent configuration UI, Context display/overflow awareness, and Settings polish.

stress_bugs_fixed.name: Temperature 0 handling
stress_bugs_fixed.fix: Changed `temperature() ? ...` to `temperature() !== "" ? ...` with clamping via Math.min(2, Math.max(0, value)). Fixed `temp &&` falsy check to `temp !== undefined &&`. Same fix for top_p.

stress_bugs_fixed.name: Delete confirmation
stress_bugs_fixed.fix: Added confirmDelete signal with confirmation UI. Changed handleDeleteAgent to set pending state. Added handleConfirmDelete and handleCancelDelete handlers.

stress_bugs_fixed.name: Null-safety guards
stress_bugs_fixed.fix: Added optional chaining on sync.data?.part and msg.tokens?.cache?.read/write with ?? 0 fallbacks.

lane_freeze_condition: This lane (desktop-feature-parity-phase1) is frozen pending Phase 2 consumption. The 3 remaining Phase 1 features are delivered, stress bugs fixed, and admitted via prepublication review. Reopen only for a concrete defect inside the released boundary or when Phase 2 integration consumes these components.
